prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, warm wooden interior, lively background. Natsu Moonvale, an androgynous ranger with a green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch, stands facing Natsu Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor with a bright scarf. Moonvale holds a sealed quest parcel with both hands, extending it toward Ashbell in a clear, deliberate handoff motion. Cinematic lighting, soft focus, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild hall shot. Natsu Ashbell accepts the sealed quest parcel from Natsu Moonvale. Both characters perform a slight, respectful bow to each other as the handoff completes. Warm anime RPG lighting, consistent character appearance and attire, fluid motion, no text, no watermark.
